form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. At the last outing finished 7th over 425m at Bendigo beaten 10 lengths (24.90) behind Leonessa in a Special conditions H on March 31. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Placed last time (23.05) at this track in a Rank Limit - Grade 5, finishing second and beaten 0.8 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and seven places from 15 starts. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 3.5 lengths (22.67) behind Bush Circus in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on March 19. Placed two back at Ballarat. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (25.34) at Bendigo in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 15 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed six times. Looks well placed and should feature.
